pipeline.x-prompt: What should be the name of the oc pipeline?

infra.description: Name of the OpenShift Project for build infrastructure.
infra.x-prompt: What project should be used for build infrastructure?

type.description: Jenkins or GitHub Actions based pipeline.

envs.description: Names of the OpenShift Projects for environments.
envs.x-prompt: What projects should be used for environments (dev test prod)?

registry.description: Container registry to publish images to (e.g., ghcr.io/my-org).
registry.x-prompt: What container registry should images be published to (e.g., ghcr.io/my-org)?

apply.description: Flag indicating if the pipeline should be applied.
